description.ko: 각진 셔터들이 파편을 압축하며 정확한 균형을 만드는 강렬한 흑백 글리치 필드.
description.en: An intense monochrome glitch field where angular shutters compress fragments into exact balance.

prompt: KURO-X artwork titled "Raster Pressure Gate": a black and white geometric glitch abstraction built as an asymmetric field of nested angular apertures, like a high-speed monochrome signal being crushed through invisible mechanical shutters. Deep #1A1A1A triangular plates, hard #FFFFFF pressure gaps, and layered #808080 / #C0C0C0 grayscale facets form a tense off-center grid with no figure, logo, sculpture, or single main object. The composition uses staggered zigzag gates, knife-thin diagonal seams, fractured checkerboard strips, stepped chevrons, and abrupt right-angle collapses that appear to accelerate across the frame while remaining mathematically balanced. Fine horizontal scanlines, grayscale channel misregistration, luma tearing, bit-crushed rectangular noise, broken halftone bands, and medium-density square particles create intense monochrome complexity. Crisp vector edges, sharp angles, high contrast, cold mechanical depth, fast visual motion, chaos locked inside exact geometric order.
